text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text:
Yes! I saw you on TV and thought you looked so
cool!

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey! I want you to read it now! Like, while
I'm here!

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text: I wrote this hoping it would be helpful for you!

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text:
I wanna see if my message gets across, and if it
gives you some strength!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: "Dear Ayabe, I'm always cheering for you."

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
"I love your blue outfit! It makes you look super
cool and fast. I'm also going to do my best to run
like you."

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
"I'll be cheering you on a lot, so keep doing your
best!"

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It was a very touching letter.

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
"Ah, this is the station, right? This is where you
had the conversation with Admire Vega that was
recorded by a passerby and went viral on social
media."

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Turn off the TV. Right now.

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text:
"Yup. And Ayabe looked suuuper happy when she
read my letter!"

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text: "Now I wanna write her another one!"
